mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.name From lesson l LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = l.student_id WHERE l.is_deleted = 0 AND l.course_id = #{id} ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT #{pageDTO.offset}, #{pageDTO.pageSize}
SELECT id, course_id FROM lesson WHERE student_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pageDTO.offset}, #{pageDTO.pageSize}
